1: Isura Al-Fatiha (Ifungura) — isura ya mbere muri Qur'ani, imirongo 7 ya Makkiya, isomwa muri buri saluwati. Umushinga w'ukwemera: ishimo, igisingizo n'ubuyobozi.
2: Isura Al-Baqara (Inka) — isura ndende kurusha izindi muri Qur'ani ifite imirongo 286, ni iya Madina; ukwemera, amategeko, amateka ya Adamu n'Ayatul-Kursi.
3: Isura Aali-Imrani (Umuryango wa Imrani) — imirongo 200 ya Madina yerekeye ubwoko bwa Imrani, kuvuka kwa Issa na Mariya, n'intambara ya Uhud.
4: Isura An-Nisa'i (Abagore) — imirongo 176 ya Madina ishyiraho amategeko y'ubukwe, ugusigirwa, uburenganzira bw'abagore, impfubyi n'ubutabera mu bitekerezo.
5: Isura Al-Maa'ida (Ameza) — imirongo 120 ya Madina yerekeye amategeko y'ibyokurya, amasezerano n'Abakirisitu n'abigishwa ba Issa.
6: Isura Al-An'am (Amatungo) — imirongo 165 ya Makka yanga kwitirira ibigirwamana kandi yemeza ubumwe bwa Allah binyuze mu bimenyetso by'iremwa.
7: Isura Al-A'rafi (Imisozi miremire) — imirongo 206 ya Makka ivuga amateka ya Adamu, Nuhu, Hud, Salih, Loti, Shu'ayb na Musa.
8: Isura Al-Anfali (Impongano z'intambara) — imirongo 75 ya Madina yerekeye intambara ya Badri, amategeko y'intambara n'ugusangirana impongano.
9: Isura At-Tawba (Kwicuza) — imirongo 129 ya Madina yerekeye amasezerano, abayoboke b'igiturikanire n'ihamagarwa rya jihadi y'ukuri. Ni isura yonyine idatangira na Bismillah.
10: Isura Yunus — imirongo 109 ya Makka yerekeye umuhanuzi Yunus, impuhwe za Allah, ukuri kwa Qur'ani n'amakuru yo kwitonda.
11: Isura Hud — imirongo 123 ya Makka ivuga amateka ya Nuhu, Hud, Salih, Ibrahimu, Loti, Shu'ayb na Musa kugirango itabarize abatemera.
12: Isura Yusufu — inkuru nziza cyane muri Qur'ani, imirongo 111 ya Makka yerekana ubuzima bwose bw'umuhanuzi Yusufu.
13: Isura Ar-Ra'd (Inkuba) — imirongo 43 isingiza Allah binyuze mu bimenyetso by'ibidukikije — inkuba, umurabyo, imisozi, imigezi.
14: Isura Ibrahimu — imirongo 52 ya Makka yubaha umuhanuzi Ibrahimu, isengesho rye, no gutanga Makka n'urubyaro rwe ku Imana.
15: Isura Al-Hijri — imirongo 99 ya Makka yerekeye abaturage b'i Hijri, iremwa rya Adamu, n'uko Iblis yanze kuneguka.
16: Isura An-Nahli (Inzuki) — imirongo 128 ya Makka yerekeye impuhwe za Allah mu iremwa — inzuki, amatungo, imigezi, imbuto — n'akazi k'abahanuzi.
17: Isura Al-Israi (Urugendo rw'ijoro) — imirongo 111 ya Makka yibuka urugendo rw'ijoro rw'umuhanuzi Muhamadi kuva Makka kugeza Al-Quds.
18: Isura Al-Kahfi (Ubuvumo) — imirongo 110 ya Makka ifite inkuru enye: abanyarubumo, amashokeso abiri, Musa na Khidr, na Dhul-Qarnayni.
19: Isura Mariya — imirongo 98 ya Makka yatanzwe ku kuvuka rw'igitangaza rya Issa na Mariya; na Zakariya, Yahaya, Ibrahimu, Musa.
20: Isura Taa-Haa — imirongo 135 ya Makka ivuga amateka yose ya Musa: guhamagara ku musozi, guhangana na Faraoni no gusohoka.
21: Isura Al-Anbiyai (Abahanuzi) — imirongo 112 ya Makka isesengura ubuzima n'akazi k'abahanuzi 16 n'ubutumwa bwabo bwa monotheizimu.
22: Isura Al-Hajj (Hajji) — imirongo 78 yerekeye imigenzo ya hajji, ubwera bwa Makka n'ugutekereza ku munsi w'imperuka.
23: Isura Al-Mu'minun (Abemera) — imirongo 118 ya Makka yerekana imico y'abemera batsinze n'inzego zirindwi z'iremwa ry'ikiremwamuntu.
24: Isura An-Nur (Urumuri) — imirongo 64 ya Madina yerekeye isuku, imibanire y'umuryango, 'umurongo w'urumuri' n'Allah nk'urumuri rw'ijuru n'isi.
25: Isura Al-Furqan (Utandukanya) — imirongo 77 ya Makka yerekeye Qur'ani nk'igipimo hagati y'ukuri n'ikinyoma, n'imico y'abagaragu ba Ar-Rahman.
26: Isura Ash-Shu'ara'i (Abasizi) — imirongo 227 ya Makka ivuga amateka y'abahanuzi barindwi: Musa, Ibrahimu, Nuhu, Hud, Salih, Loti na Shu'ayb.
27: Isura An-Namli (Imyanda) — imirongo 93 ya Makka hamwe n'umuhanuzi Sulaymani, imyanda, inyoni hud-hud n'umwamikazi w'i Saba (Bilqiisi).
28: Isura Al-Qasasi (Amateka) — imirongo 88 ya Makka yerekeye ubuzima bwa Musa i Misiri, guhunga i Madyani no gusubira kuganza Faraoni.
29: Isura Al-'Ankabut (Igitagangurirwa) — imirongo 69 ikoresha umuteto w'igitagangurirwa nk'urugero rw'ibigirwamana by'ibinyoma; ibigeragezo by'abemera.
30: Isura Ar-Rum (Abaroma) — imirongo 60 ya Makka yavuze mbere ko Abaroma bazatsinda kandi itekereza ku bimenyetso by'iremwa.
31: Isura Luqmani — imirongo 34 ya Makka yerekana inama y'ubwenge ya Luqmani kuri umwana we — inama y'umubyeyi ikomeye.
32: Isura As-Sajda (Kuneguka) — imirongo 30 ya Makka yerekeye iremwa, kuzuka n'ibihishurirwa, ifite umurongo wo kuneguka.
33: Isura Al-Ahzab (Imitwe) — imirongo 73 ya Madina irebana n'intambara y'umurama, umuryango w'umuhanuzi n'ubuyobozi bw'ubuzima bw'umuryango wa Muslim.
34: Isura Saba — imirongo 54 ya Makka ivuga ubwami bwa Saba n'impano za Dawudi na Sulaymani.
35: Isura Fatir (Umuremyi) — imirongo 45 ya Makka isingiza Allah nk'umuremyi w'ijuru n'isi, n'abamalayika nk'abatumwa.
36: Isura Yaa-Sin — imirongo 83 ya Makka ikunze kwitwa 'Umutima wa Qur'ani', yerekeye kuzuka, ubumwe bwa Allah no guhishurirwa.
37: Isura As-Saaffati (Barindi ku mirongo) — imirongo 182 ya Makka irahira abamalayika bahagaze ku mirongo, Nuhu, Ibrahimu, Musa, Haruna, Ilyasa na Yunus.
38: Isura Sad — imirongo 88 ya Makka yerekeye Dawudi, Sulaymani, Ayuba, n'uko Iblis yanze kuneguka kuri Adamu.
39: Isura Az-Zumar (Imitwe) — imirongo 75 ya Makka yerekeye ugusenga kwera, impuhwe za Allah hejuru yo kwiheba n'ibijya ku munsi w'imperuka.
40: Isura Ghafir (Utababarira) — imirongo 85 ya Makka yerekeye umwemera uhishije mu muryango wa Faraoni uhamya imbabazi za Allah.
41: Isura Fussilat (Yasobanuye) — imirongo 54 ya Makka ivuga ko imirongo ya Qur'ani isobanuwe neza, ko ari ubuvuzi n'ubuyobozi ku bemera.
42: Isura Ash-Shura (Inama) — imirongo 53 ya Makka ishyiraho inama nk'umushinga w'ubutegetsi bwiza ku Basilamu.
43: Isura Az-Zukhrufi (Imitako ya zahabu) — imirongo 89 ya Makka itabariza mu rugero rw'ubutunzi bw'isi kandi ivuga Issa.
44: Isura Ad-Dukhani (Umwotsi) — imirongo 59 ya Makka yerekana umwotsi nk'ikimenyetso cy'umunsi w'imperuka n'irimbuka rya Faraoni.
45: Isura Al-Jathiya (Bapfukamye) — imirongo 37 ya Makka yavuze ko ibihugu bizapfukama ku munsi w'imperuka.
46: Isura Al-Ahqafi (Imisozi y'umusenyi) — imirongo 35 ya Makka yibuka irimbuka ry'abantu ba 'Adi n'injini zumvaga Qur'ani.
47: Isura Muhamadi — imirongo 38 ya Madina ishyiraho amategeko ya jihadi n'imico y'abemera mu gihe cy'intambara.
48: Isura Al-Fathi (Intsinzi) — imirongo 29 ya Madina itangaza amasezerano ya Hudeybiyya nk'intsinzi igaragara hejuru ya Quraysh.
49: Isura Al-Hujurati (Amazu) — imirongo 18 ya Madina ishyiraho imyitwarire yo mu muryango w'abantu — ikiganiro, kwamagana n'ubuvandimwe.
50: Isura Qaf — imirongo 45 ya Makka yemeza ukuri kwa kuzuka n'urubanza hamwe n'ijwi rikomeye.
51: Isura Az-Zariyati (Imiyaga ikwirakwiza) — imirongo 60 ya Makka yemeza amasezerano y'ukwemera kandi ivuga Ibrahimu na Musa.
52: Isura At-Turi (Umusozi) — imirongo 49 ya Makka irahira ukuri kwa kuzuka ku musozi no ku gitabo.
53: Isura An-Najmu (Inyenyeri) — imirongo 62 ya Makka ivuga Mi'raaj y'umuhanuzi n'uguhura kwe na Jibrili.
54: Isura Al-Qamari (Ukwezi) — imirongo 55 ya Makka itangirira ku gitangaza cyo kugabanya ukwezi cy'umuhanuzi n'irimbuka ry'ibihugu by'abataraho.
55: Isura Ar-Rahmani (Ufite impuhwe) — imirongo 78 yitwa 'Ubwiza bwa Qur'ani' — ivuga impuhwe za Allah n'ikibazo 'Ni impuhwe zihe za Nyagasani wanyu mwahakanye?'
56: Isura Al-Waqi'a (Icyabaye) — imirongo 96 ya Makka igabanya abantu mu matsinda atatu ku munsi w'imperuka.
57: Isura Al-Hadid (Icyuma) — imirongo 29 ya Madina itangaza Allah nk'Uwa mbere n'Uwa nyuma no guhamagarwa kw'igitambo cy'ukwemera.
58: Isura Al-Mujadala (Umugore umpaka) — imirongo 22 ya Madina itangira n'ikirego cy'umugore Allah yasubije, n'amategeko y'umuryango.
59: Isura Al-Hashri (Ikusanyo) — imirongo 24 ya Madina yerekeye kwirukana ubwoko bw'Abayahudi Banu Nadir i Madina n'amazina 99 ya Allah.
60: Isura Al-Mumtahana (Umugore wageragejwe) — imirongo 13 ya Madina ishyiraho imibanire y'abemera bahunze n'abanywanyi babo batemera.
61: Isura As-Saff (Umurongo) — imirongo 14 ya Madina isingiza abemera barwanira ukwemera nk'abari ku murongo, kandi ivuga Issa.
62: Isura Al-Jumu'a (Gatanu) — imirongo 11 ya Madina ishyiraho saluwati ya Gatanu no gusiga ubucuruzi igihe bahamagariwe gusali.
63: Isura Al-Munafiqun (Abayoboke b'igiturikanire) — imirongo 11 ya Madina ihishura abanzi bo mu rugo — abayoboke b'igiturikanire — i Madina.
64: Isura At-Taghabuni (Igihombo rusange) — imirongo 18 ya Madina ihamagara umunsi w'imperuka 'umunsi w'igihombo rusange'.
65: Isura At-Talaqi (Gutandukana) — imirongo 12 ya Madina ishyiraho inzira zo gutandukana, igihe cyo gutegereza no kwitondera ubutabera.
66: Isura At-Tahrimi (Kubuza) — imirongo 12 ya Madina yerekeye ubuzima bwo mu rugo rw'umuhanuzi n'abagore bashushanya ku bemera.
67: Isura Al-Mulki (Ubwami) — imirongo 30 ya Makka yitwa 'isura y'agakiza', Nyagasani wayo ni umwami w'amajuru arindwi.
68: Isura Al-Qalami (Ikaramu) — imirongo 52 ya Makka isingiza imico myiza y'umuhanuzi kandi ivuga Yunus n'urugero rw'abanyuzi b'ubusitani.
69: Isura Al-Haqqa (Utagira iyo ahungira) — imirongo 52 ya Makka yerekana ukuri kwa kuzuka n'irimbuka rya 'Adi na Thamudi.
70: Isura Al-Ma'ariji (Intambwe zo kuzamuka) — imirongo 44 ya Makka isobanura inzira abamalayika bazamuka kugeza kuri Allah n'umunsi w'imperuka.
71: Isura Nuhu — imirongo 28 ya Makka ivuga guhamagara kw'umuhanuzi Nuhu mu myaka 950 y'abaturage be kuri Allah umwe rukumbi n'umwuzure.
72: Isura Al-Jinn (Injini) — imirongo 28 ya Makka ivuga injini zumvise Qur'ani zemera ukwemera.
73: Isura Al-Muzzammili (Upfundikiye) — imirongo 20 ya Makka yoherereza ubutumwa umuhanuzi Muhamadi ku gusenga kw'ijoro no kwihangana.
74: Isura Al-Muddatstsiri (Wihishe) — imirongo 56 ya Makka ihamagara umuhanuzi nyuma y'ihishurirwa rya mbere ngo aburire abantu.
75: Isura Al-Qiyama (Kuzuka) — imirongo 40 ya Makka yerekana ibiba ku munsi w'imperuka n'urugamba rw'umwuka igihe apfa.
76: Isura Al-Insani (Umuntu) — imirongo 31 ya Madina yerekana iremwa ry'umuntu, uburenganzira bwo guhitamo n'igihembo cy'Ubwami bwo mu Ijuru ku bemera.
77: Isura Al-Mursalati (Bohereje) — imirongo 50 ya Makka irahira imiyaga yoherejwe nk'abatumwa kandi ivuga umunsi w'imperuka.
78: Isura An-Naba (Amakuru) — imirongo 40 ya Makka yerekeye amakuru akomeye — umunsi w'imperuka — n'ibimenyetso by'iremwa rya Allah.
79: Isura An-Nazi'ati (Bakuramo) — imirongo 46 ya Makka ivuga abamalayika bakuramo ubugingo n'ubwibone bwa Faraoni.
80: Isura 'Abasa (Yaranenye mu maso) — imirongo 42 ya Makka aho Allah yategetse umuhanuzi ko yaramuteye kubera kutita ku muhumye washakaga ubuyobozi.
81: Isura At-Takwiri (Uguhiniryanwa) — imirongo 29 ya Makka yerekana iherezo ry'isi hamwe n'ibigereranyo by'imbaraga — izuba rihiniryanwa, inyenyeri zigwa.
82: Isura Al-Infitari (Guturika) — imirongo 19 ya Makka yerekana ijuru riturika n'imva zihirika.
83: Isura Al-Mutaffifini (Abashukanyi) — imirongo 36 ya Makka icira urubanza abashukanyi mu bucuruzi.
84: Isura Al-Inshiqaqi (Gucikamo) — imirongo 25 ya Makka yerekana ijuru ricikamo ryumvira Nyagasani waryo n'ibiba ku munsi w'imperuka.
85: Isura Al-Buruji (Inzu z'inyenyeri) — imirongo 22 ya Makka ivuga gutwikirwa kw'abemera mu cyobo no kurengerwa kwa Allah.
86: Isura At-Tariqi (Umusuri w'ijoro) — imirongo 17 ya Makka isuzuma inyenyeri igaragara nijoro n'iremwa ry'umuntu ukuva mu mazi arekura.
87: Isura Al-A'la (Urusumba byose) — imirongo 19 ya Makka isingiza izina rya Allah rirusumba kandi yerekana abemera batsinze.
88: Isura Al-Ghashiya (Ipfuka) — imirongo 26 ya Makka ihamagara icyabaye cy'ipfuka cy'umunsi w'imperuka kandi igereranya Ubwami bwo mu Ijuru n'umuriro.
89: Isura Al-Fajri (Urumuri rw'umucyo) — imirongo 30 ya Makka irahira urumuri rw'umucyo n'amajoro icumi, kandi ivuga 'Adi, Thamudi, Faraoni.
90: Isura Al-Baladi (Umujyi) — imirongo 20 ya Makka irahira umujyi wera wa Makka kandi yerekana urugamba rw'ubuzima bw'umuntu.
91: Isura Ash-Shamsi (Izuba) — imirongo 15 ya Makka irahira izuba, ukwezi n'ijuru kandi ivuga irimbuka rya Thamudi.
92: Isura Al-Layli (Ijoro) — imirongo 21 ya Makka irahira ijoro n'amanywa kandi yerekana itandukaniro ryo gutangira umutima na nyir'inyota.
93: Isura Ad-Duha (Kare) — imirongo 11 ya Makka ihumuriza umuhanuzi Muhamadi 'Nyagasani wawe ntiyakuretse'.
94: Isura Ash-Sharhi (Gufungura) — imirongo 8 ya Makka 'Ese ntiwatufunguriye umutima wawe?' itangaza umurindi nyuma y'umuruho.
95: Isura At-Tini (Imbuto y'umutini) — imirongo 8 ya Makka irahira imbuto y'umutini, umuzeituni n'umusozi Sinayi, kandi yerekana icyubahiro cy'umuntu.
96: Isura Al-'Alaqi (Amaraso akuka) — imirongo 19 ya Makka: 'Soma!' — ihishurirwa rya mbere ku muhanuzi.
97: Isura Al-Qadri (Icyubahiro) — imirongo 5 ya Makka yerekeye ijoro ry'icyubahiro 'riruta amezi 1000' igihe Qur'ani yamanuwe.
98: Isura Al-Bayyina (Ikimenyetso kigaragara) — imirongo 8 ya Madina yemeza Muhamadi nk'ikimenyetso kigaragara cy'umuhanuzi wa Allah.
99: Isura Az-Zalzala (Nyamugigima) — imirongo 8 ya Madina yavuze umunsi w'imperuka ubwo isi izanyeganyega n'ibanga ryayo rizavumburwa.
100: Isura Al-'Adiyati (Iriruka) — imirongo 11 ya Makka irahira amafarasi y'intambara ariruka kandi icira urubanza kubura ubushishozi kw'umuntu.
101: Isura Al-Qari'a (Igihuhumwa) — imirongo 11 ya Makka yerekana icyabaye cy'igihuhumwa cy'umunsi w'imperuka n'abantu batembera nk'ubudodo buhumeka.
102: Isura At-Takatsuri (Kwiyongera) — imirongo 8 ya Makka itabariza ko kwiyongera bijyana abantu ku mva no ku kibazo.
103: Isura Al-'Asri (Igihe) — imirongo 3 ya Makka: 'Abantu bose bari mu gihombo' — uretse abemera, abakora neza n'abihanganye.
104: Isura Al-Humaza (Unebera) — imirongo 9 ya Makka icira urubanza abanebera abantu n'abahuriza ubutunzi.
105: Isura Al-Fili (Inzovu) — imirongo 5 ya Makka yerekeye Abraha wazanye ingabo z'inzovu kugirango asenye Ka'aba mu mwaka wavutsemo umuhanuzi.
106: Isura Quraishi — imirongo 4 ya Makka isingiza umutekano w'umuryango wa Quraishi n'ingendo z'igihembwe cy'imbeho n'ubushyuhe.
107: Isura Al-Ma'uni (Ibicaromu bito) — imirongo 7 ya Makka icira urubanza abahakana idini ndetse bakabuza abakene ubufasha.
108: Isura Al-Kawthari (Ubwinshi) — imirongo 3, ni isura ngufi cyane, itangaza ku muhanuzi uruzi mu Ijuru n'ubwinshi bw'imigisha.
109: Isura Al-Kafiruni (Abatemera) — imirongo 6 ya Makka: 'Mufite idini ryanyu, njye mfite idini ryanjye' — kwitandukanya n'ibigirwamana.
110: Isura An-Nasri (Ubufasha) — imirongo 3 ya Madina yamanuwe mu ntsinzi ya Makka, itangaza kuza kw'ubufasha bwa Allah.
111: Isura Al-Masadi (Umugozi) — imirongo 5 ya Makka icira urubanza inyangurubyaro y'umuhanuzi, Abu Lahabu, kubera urwango rw'ukwemera.
112: Isura Al-Ikhlasi (Isukiro) — imirongo 4 ya Makka yerekana ubumwe bwa Allah: 'Vuga: Ni Allah, Umwe' — ihwanye na kimwe cya gatatu cya Qur'ani.
113: Isura Al-Falaqi (Urumuri rw'umucyo) — imirongo 5 ya Makka isaba ubuhungiro kuri Nyagasani w'urumuri rw'umucyo kugira ngo urinde ikibi, uburozi n'ishyari.
114: Isura An-Naasi (Abantu) — imirongo 6 isoza Qur'ani, isaba ubuhungiro kuri Nyagasani w'abantu kugira ngo arinde impungenge z'injini n'abantu.
